_comment: Live state for the L3RAIN Command Center. Your orchestrator / GitHub Actions overwrites this file; the dashboard polls it every few seconds. department status: working | error | waiting | idle | opening | paused | done. IMPORTANT: when an agent/department hits a token or rate limit and is NOT actually producing, write 'paused' (or 'idle') here — do NOT leave it 'working', or the office will keep showing it as active.
